subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Through His supreme bounty thou hast attained, and from the chalice of grace thou hast quaffed the Salsabíl of reunion with the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد بعنایت کبری فائز گشتی و سلسبیل لقای مالک اسماء را از قدح فضل نوشیدی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @unity; oneness of humanity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
